skill1.kitLine: Activates at the start of battle. Affects self. Charges Extrasensory to 100%, up to 100%. Continuous, cannot be removed.
skill1.note: Currency bookkeeping folded into the fused-passive derivation — gauge starts at 100% so all thresholds are met at t=0.

skill1.kitLine: Only when at 100%: Dodging Bullets: Invulnerable for 2 sec.
skill1.note: Genuinely skippable — invulnerability has no engine vocabulary and no DPS impact at scope lock (partless boss, no incoming damage).

skill1.kitLine: Only when above 70%: ATK ▲ 53.69%. Continuous, cannot be removed.
skill1.note: Fused passive: live from t=0, expires at 60s (derived >70% crossing time at 0.5%/s drain from 100%). Refreshed on own burstCast via skill1[2].

skill1.kitLine: Only when above 55%: True Damage ▲ 48.62%. Continuous, cannot be removed.
skill1.note: Fused passive: expires at 90s (derived >55% crossing). Refreshed on own burstCast via skill1[2].

skill1.kitLine: Only when above 25%: Hit Rate ▲ 22.37%. Continuous, cannot be removed.
skill1.note: Fused passive: expires at 150s (derived >25% crossing). Refreshed on own burstCast via skill1[2]. hitRatePct is engine-inert in v1 (hard rule 4).

skill1.kitLine: Each subsequent effect triggers all effects before it (cumulative thresholds).
skill1.note: Implicitly captured: all three buffs active simultaneously from t=0, dropping off in order as the gauge drains. Correctly models the cumulative nature.
Currency drain bookkeeping folded into the fused-passive duration derivation (0.5%/s = 1%/2s). Not simulated tick-by-tick.

skill1.kitLine: (Burst refresh: own burstCast recharges Extrasensory to 100%, re-applying all three threshold buffs.)
skill1.note: Same keys → refresh semantics. Reproduces permanent gates in burst-each-~40s rotation (40s refresh < 60s ATK fuse) and correct decay in never-burst comps.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when using Burst Skill. Affects self. Normal attacks deal true damage for 10 sec.
skill2.where: skill2[0] burstCast weaponSwap damagePct:10.12 durationSec:10 trueNormals:true
skill2.note: Same-weapon swap (takina precedent). damagePct 10.12 = her own normalAttackMultiplier (unchanged). trueNormals:true makes normals true damage for 10s. The S1 trueDamagePct 48.62 applies to normals ONLY inside this window (flavor gate). Engine artifact: swap start+end each instant-refill mag (~2 free reloads/cycle, mild optimism).

skill2.kitLine: Activates after landing 48 normal attack(s). Affects the target. Deals 472.18% of final ATK as true damage.
skill2.where: skill2[1] hitCount count:48, flatDamage atkPct:472.18 flavor:'true'
skill2.note: Hard rule 5 (flatDamage for fixed-ATK% hits). FB-by-timing default (no noFb flag). Permanently boosted by the flavor-gated 48.62% trueDamagePct from S1.

burst.note: Folded into the trajectory derivation — the burstCast skill1[2] block handles the mechanical effect (refreshing all three threshold buffs). The currency line itself is bookkeeping.
Her own burst cast (hard rule 6). Straightforward timed self-buff.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1: Extrasensory threshold buffs modeled as FUSED PASSIVES (live from t=0, expire at 60/90/150s, REFRESH on own burstCast). Replaces prior permanent encoding that OVER-CREDITED never-burst comps.
documentedConfounds.why: This is the corrected model — it fixes a prior over-credit. In burst-each-rotation comps (PI/PI2) gates stay permanently refreshed (unchanged); in never-burst comps gates correctly decay. The note verifies PI/PI2 comps unchanged at ~1.19 after the A/B.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: weaponSwap trueNormals grants instant mag refill at cast AND at window end (engine artifact, ~2 free reloads/cycle, mild shot-count optimism).
documentedConfounds.why: Extra shots from free reloads inflate damage. At SMG 120-round mag with 81f reload, ~2 free reloads/cycle ≈ 240 extra shots/180s ≈ meaningful over-count. Note explicitly identifies this as a contributor to her HOT board.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: core/crit retained on true normals (takina precedent, unverified in-game). SMG coreMult 250 = big lever if true damage actually forfeits core.
documentedConfounds.why: If true damage forfeits core hits in-game, the sim over-credits every true-normal shot by the core multiplier (250%). Note explicitly flags this as a potential major HOT contributor. Unverified.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑ cadence tuple: SMG class pullsPerSec + reloadFrames 81 + rolling-reload unverified (datamine); 120-round mag at class rate ≈ 9–10s, plausible, no escalation tells.
documentedConfounds.why: Unmeasured but plausible; no directional bias identified. Could shift either way if real cadence differs from datamine.

documentedConfounds.text: hitRatePct 22.37 is engine-inert in v1 (hard rule 4) — raises core-hit rate, magnitude ⚑.
documentedConfounds.why: Inert means no over- or under-credit currently. If hit-rate affects core-hit probability in-game, the sim under-credits her slightly (COLD direction), but the effect is unmeasured and likely small.

documentedConfounds.text: The 0.5%/s drain + gate thresholds are DERIVED from kit text, not measured — crossing times are exact given the drain rate; the drain rate itself is the kit's stated 1%/2s.
documentedConfounds.why: Derivation is internally consistent. Only breaks if the real drain rate differs from the stated 1%/2s (unlikely but unmeasured).

documentedConfounds.text: Her dominant hotness in PI/PI2 misc-B3 comps is NOT Extrasensory decay but a SEPARATE over-model (swap mag-refill optimism / true-normal core retention on SMG coreMult 250 / ⚑ cadence).
documentedConfounds.why: Author's own diagnosis: the ~1.19–1.23 HOT is driven by the weaponSwap mag-refill + core-on-true-normals interaction, not the Extrasensory model. These are the primary suspects for the board gap.

authorIntentSummary: The override models Chisato's Extrasensory gauge as three FUSED PASSIVES (ATK 53.69%/60s, True Damage 48.62%/90s, Hit Rate 22.37%/150s) that decay from battle start and refresh on her own burstCast — faithfully reproducing both permanent (burst-each-rotation) and decaying (never-burst) regimes. Skill 2's true-damage normals use the takina-precedent weaponSwap encoding (trueNormals:true, 10s window), and the 48-hit proc is a straightforward true flatDamage. The author explicitly flags the HOT board (~1.20) as driven NOT by the Extrasensory model but by weaponSwap mag-refill optimism (~2 free reloads/cycle) and unverified core/crit retention on true normals (SMG coreMult 250 is a large lever if forfeited). The unit remains MODEL_ONLY/untuned with no measurement against a real fight.
